intro:

For the sake of this task, I will provide information on Eclipta alba.

Eclipta alba is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a traditional herbal remedy, commonly used for its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to improve hair growth, reduce inflammation, and enhance cognitive function. 

The bioactive constituents of Eclipta alba include flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

Eclipta alba is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and topical creams. The most common herbal preparations made with Eclipta alba are hair growth supplements, anti-inflammatory creams, and cognitive function-enhancing teas.
